stem: ___ this your umbrella?
explanation: 主语 this 是单数第三人称，be 动词用 is；一般疑问句把 is 提到句首。

stem: Is this ___ pen? — Yes, it's my pen.
explanation: 形容词性物主代词 your 后面接名词 pen；yours 是名词性物主代词，后面不接名词。

stem: He is ___ engineer.
explanation: engineer 以元音音素 /e/ 开头，不定冠词用 an。

stem: She is ___ nurse.
explanation: nurse 以辅音音素 /n/ 开头，不定冠词用 a。

stem: ___ book here is mine.
explanation: here 表示近处，单数名词 book 用 this。

stem: Look at ___ glasses over there.
explanation: over there 表示远处，复数名词 glasses 用 those。

stem: I have two ___.
explanation: 以 f/fe 结尾的名词多数变复数时把 f/fe 改成 ves：knife → knives。

stem: There are three ___ on the desk.
explanation: 以 x 结尾的名词加 -es 构成复数：box → boxes。

stem: Those ___ are playing in the park.
explanation: child 的复数是不规则形式 children。

stem: There ___ a book on the table.
explanation: There be 句型就近原则，主语 a book 是单数，用 is。

stem: There ___ some cups in the cupboard.
explanation: 主语 some cups 是复数，There be 用 are。

stem: The dog is ___ the table (在桌子下面).
explanation: under 表示“在……下面”。

stem: The magazine is ___ the newspaper (在报纸上面).
explanation: on 表示“在……表面上”。

stem: Where is Sally? She ___ in the garden.
explanation: 现在进行时 be + doing，表示此刻正在进行；主语 she 用 is。

stem: Look! The children ___ football.
explanation: Look! 提示正在进行，主语 children 为复数用 are + playing。

stem: It's very late, but I ___ now. I'm still reading.
explanation: 现在进行时否定：am/is/are + not + doing。

stem: Mr Sawyer ___ to work every day.
explanation: every day 表示习惯，用一般现在时；主语第三人称单数，go → goes。

stem: She ___ coffee every morning.
explanation: 第三人称单数一般现在时动词加 -s：drink → drinks。

stem: He ___ gets up early.
explanation: 频率副词 always 放在实义动词 gets 之前，不加 be。

stem: He usually ___ tea, but this morning he ___ coffee.
explanation: usually 用一般现在时 drinks；this morning + 此刻动作用现在进行时 is drinking。

stem: I want ___ sugar.
explanation: 肯定句中表示“一些”用 some；sugar 不可数不能用 a/an。

stem: Have you got ___ butter?
explanation: 一般疑问句中通常用 any 表示“一些/任何”。

stem: There isn't ___ milk in the bottle.
explanation: 否定句用 any；milk 不可数不用 many。

stem: ___ apples do you want?
explanation: apples 是可数名词复数，提问数量用 How many。

stem: ___ you swim? — Yes, I can.
explanation: 情态动词 can 表示“能够”，疑问句把 can 提到句首。

stem: A baby ___ walk.
explanation: can 的否定是 can't (cannot)，后接动词原形。

stem: You ___ see a dentist.
explanation: 情态动词 must 表示“必须”，无人称变化，后接动词原形。

stem: ___ your books, please.
explanation: 祈使句以动词原形开头，表示请求或命令。

stem: ___ colour is your car? — It's red.
explanation: 问颜色用 What colour。

stem: ___ bag is this? — It's Penny's.
explanation: Whose 提问“谁的”，后接名词；Who's = who is 不同。

stem: Give the book to ___.
explanation: 介词 to 后用宾格代词 me。

stem: This pen is ___.
explanation: 名词性物主代词 mine 单独使用，等于 my pen。

stem: The weather ___ fine yesterday.
explanation: yesterday 用一般过去时；主语 weather 单数，be 的过去式用 was。

stem: They ___ at home last night.
explanation: 主语 they 为复数，be 的过去式用 were。

stem: We ___ Paris last spring.
explanation: last spring 用一般过去时，规则动词加 -ed：visit → visited。

stem: He ___ to London yesterday.
explanation: go 的过去式是不规则形式 went。

stem: I ___ a letter this morning.
explanation: write 的过去式是不规则形式 wrote。

stem: The dinner is ready. Mother has ___ cooked it.
explanation: 现在完成时中 just 表示“刚刚”，放在 have/has 与过去分词之间。

stem: I have lived here ___ 2010.
explanation: since + 时间点，表示从过去某点持续到现在。

stem: She has studied English ___ three years.
explanation: for + 一段时间，表示持续了多久。

stem: They ___ already finished the work.
explanation: 现在完成时 have/has + 过去分词，主语 they 用 have。

stem: He has ___ his homework.
explanation: 现在完成时需用过去分词，do 的过去分词是 done。

stem: While I ___, the phone rang.
explanation: 过去某动作进行中被另一动作打断，用过去进行时 was/were + doing。

stem: I ___ call you tomorrow.
explanation: tomorrow 表将来，用 will + 动词原形。

stem: Look at those clouds. It ___ rain.
explanation: 有现时迹象（乌云）预示将要发生，用 be going to。

stem: I want ___ you.
explanation: want 后接动词不定式 to do。

stem: This box is ___ than that one.
explanation: than 表示比较，用比较级；heavy 变 y 为 i 加 er → heavier。

stem: This is the ___ book in the shop.
explanation: in the shop 表示范围用最高级；多音节形容词用 most。

stem: I get up ___ 7 o'clock.
explanation: at + 具体钟点。

stem: My birthday is ___ May.
explanation: in + 月份/年份/季节。

stem: She ___ (drink) tea every morning.
explanation: 第三人称单数一般现在时，drink 加 -s。

stem: There are five ___ (city) in this area.
explanation: 辅音字母 + y 结尾，变 y 为 i 加 es：city → cities。

stem: Listen! The birds ___ (sing).
explanation: Listen! 提示正在进行，用现在进行时 are singing。

stem: Yesterday he ___ (buy) a new car.
explanation: buy 的过去式是不规则形式 bought。

stem: There is ___ apple on the table. (填 a 或 an)
explanation: apple 以元音音素开头，用 an。

stem: I ___ my keys. I can't find them now.
explanation: 过去丢钥匙对现在造成影响（现在找不到），用现在完成时。

stem: When I arrived at the station, the train ___ already left.
explanation: “过去的过去”用过去完成时 had + 过去分词。

stem: He ___ smoke, but he stopped last year.
explanation: used to do 表示过去常常做而现在不再做。

stem: This house ___ in 1990.
explanation: 房子是被建造的，过去时间用一般过去时被动语态 was + 过去分词。

stem: English ___ all over the world.
explanation: 英语被人们讲，一般现在时被动 is/are + 过去分词。

stem: The man ___ lives next door is a doctor.
explanation: 先行词 the man 指人且在从句作主语，用 who。

stem: The book ___ I bought yesterday is interesting.
explanation: 先行词 the book 指物且在从句作宾语，用 which（也可用 that）。

stem: This is the house ___ I was born.
explanation: 先行词是地点且从句缺状语，用关系副词 where。

stem: He said that he ___ tired.
explanation: 间接引语中主句为过去时，从句时态相应后移，is → was。

stem: She asked me where I ___.
explanation: 间接引语的宾语从句用陈述语序，且时态后移 live → lived。

stem: If it ___ tomorrow, we'll stay at home.
explanation: 真实条件句主将从现：从句用一般现在时 rains，主句用 will。

stem: If I ___ rich, I would travel around the world.
explanation: 与现在事实相反的虚拟语气，be 动词一律用 were。

stem: The lights are on, so he ___ be at home.
explanation: must 表示有把握的肯定推测“一定”。

stem: She has just eaten, so she ___ be hungry.
explanation: can't 表示有把握的否定推测“不可能”。

stem: I enjoy ___ football at weekends.
explanation: enjoy 后接动名词 doing。

stem: He decided ___ abroad next year.
explanation: decide 后接动词不定式 to do。

stem: I ___ for you for two hours!
explanation: 强调动作从过去持续到现在并可能继续，用现在完成进行时 have been doing。

stem: You are a student, ___?
explanation: 前肯定后否定；陈述句用 are，反义疑问用 aren't you。

stem: I have ___ (see) that film already.
explanation: see 的过去分词是 seen。

stem: The letter ___ (write) by Tom yesterday.
explanation: 过去被动语态：was + 过去分词 written。

stem: The thief ___ the shop last night and stole the money.
explanation: break into 表示“闯入、破门而入”。

stem: Not only ___ late, but he also forgot the tickets.
explanation: 否定词 Not only 置于句首，句子部分倒装，助/系动词提前。

stem: I wish I ___ how to drive a car.
explanation: wish 后与现在事实相反用一般过去时表虚拟。

stem: ___ tired, he went to bed early.
explanation: 现在分词作状语，逻辑主语 he 主动“感到”，用 -ing 形式。

stem: London, ___ is the capital of England, is a big city.
explanation: 非限制性定语从句指物用 which，不能用 that。

stem: The new medicine had a good ___ on the patient.
explanation: effect 是名词“效果、影响”；affect 是动词。

stem: ___ he was very tired, he continued working.
explanation: Although 引导让步状语从句，后接句子；Despite 后接名词。

stem: It was in Paris ___ I first met her.
explanation: 强调句型 It is/was + 强调部分 + that...，强调地点状语也用 that。

stem: Prices continue to ___ every year.
explanation: rise 是不及物动词“上升”；raise 是及物动词，后需宾语。

stem: By the time you arrive, I ___ everything.
explanation: By the time + 将来动作，主句用将来完成时 will have + 过去分词。

stem: The theory ___ many scientists is now widely accepted.
explanation: 过去分词短语作后置定语，表被动“被……提出的”。

stem: The committee ___ ten members.
explanation: comprise 直接接宾语，表示“由……组成”，不加 of。

stem: ___ I known earlier, I would have helped you.
explanation: 虚拟条件句省略 if 时倒装，Had + 主语 + 过去分词。

stem: He refused the bribe on ___.
explanation: on principle 表示“出于原则”；principal 指“校长/主要的”。

stem: The results were inconclusive; ___, further study is needed.
explanation: 前后为因果关系，用 therefore“因此”。

stem: The new findings are ___ with previous research.
explanation: be consistent with 表示“与……一致”。

stem: There ___ two armchairs near the window.
explanation: 主语 two armchairs 是复数，There be 用 are。

stem: The ball is ___ the door (在门后面).
explanation: behind 表示“在……后面”。

stem: The lamp is ___ the two chairs (在两把椅子之间).
explanation: between…and… 表示“在两者之间”。

stem: There ___ a picture on the wall.
explanation: 主语 a picture 单数，There be 就近原则用 is。

stem: There ___ (be) some books on the shelf.
explanation: 主语 some books 复数，There be 用 are。

stem: ___ the door, please.
explanation: 祈使句以动词原形开头，表示请求。

stem: You ___ wash your hands before dinner.
explanation: 情态动词 must 无人称变化，后接动词原形。

stem: ___ your shoes; they are dirty.
explanation: 祈使句用动词原形 Clean 开头，发出命令。

stem: We ___ be quiet in the library.
explanation: must 后接动词原形 be，表示“必须”。

stem: ___ (come) in and sit down, please.
explanation: 祈使句用动词原形 Come 开头。

stem: Where is Tom? He ___ a tree in the garden.
explanation: 此刻正在进行，主语 he 用 is + climbing。

stem: The dog ___ after the cat now.
explanation: now 提示正在进行；run 双写 n 加 ing → running。

stem: The children ___ in the garden at the moment.
explanation: at the moment 表此刻，主语 children 复数用 are playing。

stem: ___ is Sally? — She is in the garden.
explanation: 询问地点用 Where。

stem: Look! The cat ___ (climb) the tree.
explanation: Look! 提示正在进行，主语单数用 is climbing。

stem: The sun ___ and the birds are singing.
explanation: 描述此刻画面用现在进行时，主语单数用 is shining。

stem: A boy is flying a kite ___ the sky.
explanation: 固定搭配 in the sky（在天空中）。

stem: Some children are sitting ___ the grass.
explanation: 固定搭配 on the grass（在草地上）。

stem: Look! Two dogs ___ on the grass.
explanation: Look! 提示正在进行，主语 two dogs 复数用 are running。

stem: The sun ___ (shine) brightly now.
explanation: now 提示正在进行，主语单数用 is shining。

stem: Our village ___ in a green valley.
explanation: 描述常态用一般现在时，主语第三人称单数 village，stand 加 -s。

stem: The river runs ___ two hills (在两座山之间).
explanation: between 用于两者之间；among 用于三者以上。

stem: There are tall trees ___ the river bank.
explanation: along 表示“沿着”河岸。

stem: The river ___ past the old wall.
explanation: 一般现在时描述客观状态，主语单数 river，flow 加 -s。

stem: There is a small house ___ (在……之间) the two hills.
explanation: 两座山之间用 between。

stem: What ___ you ___? — I am making a bookcase.
explanation: 现在进行时问句：What are you doing?（你正在做什么？）

stem: I ___ paint the bookcase blue.
explanation: be going to + 动词原形表打算，主语 I 用 am going to。

stem: They ___ plant some trees next week.
explanation: 主语 they 复数，be going to 中 be 用 are。

stem: Look, he ___ the wall now.
explanation: Look/now 提示正在进行，主语单数用 is painting。

stem: She ___ (be) going to visit her aunt tomorrow.
explanation: be going to 结构中，主语 she 用 is。

stem: ___ drop the vase! It's fragile.
explanation: 否定祈使句用 Don't + 动词原形，表示劝阻。

stem: Be careful! We ___ a heavy box downstairs.
explanation: 描述此刻动作，主语 we 用 are carrying。

stem: ___ run in the room, please.
explanation: 否定祈使句以 Don't 开头，后接动词原形 run。

stem: He ___ the other end of the table now.
explanation: now 提示正在进行，主语单数用 is holding。

stem: ___ (not drop) the plate! (填否定祈使句开头)
explanation: 否定祈使句用 Don't + 动词原形 drop。

stem: This is ___ handbag; it belongs to Penny.
explanation: 名词 handbag 前用形容词性物主代词 her（她的）。

stem: Is this ___ pen? — Yes, it's mine.
explanation: pen 前需要形容词性物主代词 your（你的），回答用名词性物主代词 mine。

stem: This is ___ bag. (这是汤姆的包)
explanation: 单数人名所有格在名词后加 's，构成 Tom's（汤姆的）。

stem: That coat is old, but ___ (她的) coat is new.
explanation: coat 前填形容词性物主代词 her（她的）。

stem: Hurry up! I ___ for my keys now.
explanation: now 表示此刻，主语 I 用 am + looking。

stem: ___ you looking for the spoon?
explanation: 现在进行时疑问句把 be 提前，主语 you 用 Are。

stem: She ___ the cupboard at the moment.
explanation: at the moment 表此刻，主语单数用 is + cleaning。

stem: Listen! He ___ (help) his mother in the kitchen.
explanation: Listen 提示正在进行，主语 he 用 is helping。

stem: This is the ___ letter, please give it to him.
explanation: boss 以 -s 结尾，所有格仍加 's，读作 /ɪz/。

stem: It is the ___ typewriter on the desk.
explanation: 单数名词 secretary 的所有格在词后加 's。

stem: The door ___ the office is open.
explanation: 无生命事物的所属用 the + 名词 + of + 名词，不用 's。

stem: Whose desk is this? — It's the ___ (typist 的) desk.
explanation: 单数名词 typist 所有格加 's，构成 typist's。

stem: Is there ___ sugar in the cup?
explanation: 疑问句中修饰不可数名词 sugar 用 any。

stem: There is ___ milk in the bottle.
explanation: 肯定句中修饰不可数名词 milk 用 some。

stem: Would you like a cup ___ coffee?
explanation: 不可数名词用单位词表量：a cup of coffee。

stem: There are some ___ on the plate.
explanation: some 修饰可数名词用复数形式 biscuits。

stem: There isn't ___ tea in the cup. (填 some 或 any)
explanation: 否定句中修饰不可数名词 tea 用 any。

stem: ___ beef do you want?
explanation: beef 不可数，问量用 How much。

stem: ___ eggs do you need?
explanation: eggs 可数复数，问数目用 How many。

stem: Sorry, we haven't got ___ chicken today.
explanation: 否定句中修饰不可数名词 chicken 用 any。

stem: I want two ___ of beef, please.
explanation: kilo 是可数名词，two 后用复数 kilos。

stem: We need ___ meat for dinner. (肯定句填 some 或 any)
explanation: 肯定句中修饰不可数名词 meat 用 some。

stem: It often ___ in autumn here.
explanation: 叙述规律天气用一般现在时，主语 it 动词加 -s。

stem: ___ it snow here in winter?
explanation: 一般现在时疑问句主语 it 用 Does，后接动词原形。

stem: The sun ___ every day in summer.
explanation: 一般现在时表规律，主语 the sun 动词加 -s。

stem: It ___ (be) warm in spring here.
explanation: 一般现在时，主语 it 的 be 动词用 is。

stem: Summer is ___ than spring.
explanation: 短形容词比较级加 -er：warmer，后接 than。

stem: This climate is ___ than that one.
explanation: 多音节形容词比较级用 more + 原级。

stem: It gets ___ in winter than in autumn.
explanation: 短形容词 cold 的比较级为 colder。

stem: The weather ___ quickly in this place.
explanation: 一般现在时表规律，主语 the weather 动词加 -s。

stem: The weather in autumn is ___ (wet) than in summer.
explanation: wet 重读闭音节，比较级双写 t 加 -er，为 wetter。

stem: He ___ gets up early in the morning.
explanation: 频率副词 always 放在实义动词 gets 之前。

stem: They ___ have dinner at seven.
explanation: 频率副词 usually 放在实义动词 have 之前。

stem: She ___ to work at eight every day.
explanation: 一般现在时表日常，主语 she 动词用 goes。

stem: He is ___ busy in the morning.
explanation: 频率副词放在 be 动词 is 之后：is always busy。

stem: They ___ (watch) TV together every evening.
explanation: 主语 they 是复数，一般现在时动词用原形 watch。
